title: Remote Repositories Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git version control patterns.

questions.question: Which Git command is used to add a new remote repository to your local project?
Regarding remote repositories, which command is used to send local commits to a specific branch on a remote server?
Which Git command is used to retrieve and merge changes from a remote branch into your local branch in a single operation?
Which command is used to record a copy of a remote Git repository onto your local system?
